proposals.source: PDF-authoritative (2023ND207.pdf extracted via pdftotext)
proposals.evidence: The PDF source shows proper citation formatting with paragraph symbols (¶) and correct spacing between numbers. The DB contains escaped LaTeX-style markup with backslashes ($...$) and malformed numbers (5,949 instead of ¶ 5, 949; 6,905 instead of ¶ 6, 905). This is a clear ingestion/processing defect where the OCR or conversion pipeline failed to properly handle the citation formatting, leaving behind escape sequences and concatenating the paragraph number with the reporter number via an erroneous comma.
proposals.note: Located in [¶4], the opening citation sentence. This is the only escaped markup block in the opinion and the first occurrence of this citation pattern in the text.
